experiences.description:
iAhorro.com
Spain's leading digital mortgage intermediation platform with innovative real estate financing solutions.
Stack: Angular 20 in CRM, Nuxt for Landing and User Area, Vue 2 CMS. Transactional System in ExpressJS. End-to-End testing with Cypress. Deployment with Bitbucket on AWS.
experiences.descriptionMobile:
Spain's leading digital mortgage intermediation platform.
Angular 20 in CRM, Nuxt for Landing and User Area. Transactional System in ExpressJS with Cypress on AWS.

experiences.description:
Catalonia Hotels & Resort
Hotel booking WebApp with 77 hotels across 25+ international and national destinations.
Stack: Angular SSR with RXjs, integrations for GTM, New Relic, Angular Material, PrimeNG. Backend in Symfony v.6 and CMS in DRUPAL on Google Cloud Platform.
experiences.descriptionMobile:
Hotel booking WebApp with 77 hotels and 25+ destinations.
Angular SSR with RXjs, Angular Material, PrimeNG. Backend Symfony and CMS Drupal on GCP.

experiences.description:
Festival Planner
MVP with Ionic (Angular) for real-time music festival map editing. Developed with Ionic, ArcGIS, TypeORM, WebSocket, OpenTelemetry on AWS.

Abertis (Highways)
ABERTIS migrations with Docker and PHP 5.6 to 7.2 migration.

experiences.description: MyFood App with Angular and Stripe. Moduletic migration from vanilla JavaScript to Angular/MySQL. WordPress and Laravel.
